summary: Pipeline broke at the write-stage analyze: generated candidate code contains undefined named parameters 'label' and 'isSelected' (12 errors). This prevented writeback, leaving the case in CANDIDATE_ONLY state. Capture never ran. The llm_repair loop partially addressed earlier errors but did not resolve the final generated-layout failures. Run Gate classified the case as FORENSIC accordingly. No visual or screen-layout analysis performed.
